name: Boboli Pizza with Garlic, Peppers and Goat Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/2 large Red Bell Pepper, thinly sliced
1/2 large Yellow or Green Bell Pepper, thinly sliced
1 tbsp Fresh Thyme Leaves, or 1 T Dried Thyme Leaves, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Heat olive oil in a heavy large skillet over medium-low heat.
3. Add sliced onion and garlic to the skillet and sauté until very soft, about 20 minutes.
4. Add sliced bell peppers and sauté for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Mix in dried crushed red pepper.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Place Boboli on a pizza pan or cookie sheet.
8. Tip the skillet so that oil accumulates at one side.
9. Brush Boboli with oil from the skillet.
10. Top with onion-pepper mixture.
11. Sprinkle with cheese and thyme.
12. Bake until cheese melts, about 12 minutes.
13. Cut into wedges and serve.
